result:
Implemented `[[note-id]]` link parsing and backlink display in `view`.

In [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L274), `viewNote` now parses outbound note links from the body, scans the note set for inbound references, and appends `Links:` / `Backlinks:` lines after the raw Markdown when either exists. I added the link parser and backlink helpers in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L571), using deduped `[[...]]` extraction and sorted backlink output.

I also added tests in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go#L832) covering link extraction, backlink rendering during `view`, and the unchanged raw output when a note has no link metadata.

I could not run `go test ./...` because this environment does not have `go` installed (`/bin/bash: go: command not found`).
